name: Cream Cheese Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a round pan, 9 x 11 inches.
2. Mix cream cheese, 1/3 cup sugar, and almond extract; reserve.
3. Mix the baking mix, 1/4 cup sugar, butter or margarine until dough forms.
4. Pat the dough into the bottom and up the sides of the pan.
5. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the dough.
6. Carefully spread preserves over the cream cheese mixture; sprinkle with almonds.
7. Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven until golden brown and the cream cheese is set, 40 to 45 minutes.
8. Cool for 20 minutes; carefully remove from the pan.
9. Refrigerate any remaining coffee cake.
